RFC_READ_TABLE.summary: SAP NetWeaver: RFC_READ_TABLE allows unauthenticated remote table reads, leading to full database disclosure.

BAPI_USER_CHANGE.summary: Missing authentication check in SAP Solution Manager allows remote admin user modification via BAPI_USER_CHANGE.

BAPI_USER_CREATE.summary: SAP NetWeaver: BAPI_USER_CREATE exposed via RFC allows remote creation of privileged accounts.

RFC_ABAP_INSTALL_AND_RUN.summary: SAP HTTP request smuggling vulnerability allows HTTP desync attack leading to RCE via RFC_ABAP_INSTALL_AND_RUN.

SXPG_COMMAND_EXECUTE.summary: SAP NetWeaver: SXPG_COMMAND_EXECUTE allows OS command injection via crafted RFC call.

SXPG_CALL_SYSTEM.summary: SAP Diagnostics Agent: SXPG_CALL_SYSTEM exposed without authentication check allows arbitrary command execution.

STRUST_MODIFY.summary: SAP AS ABAP: STRUST_MODIFY allows modification of trust store, enabling MITM on encrypted SAP communications.

/SAPSLL/API_6700_SOCUST.summary: Custom SAP GTS namespace function with known privilege escalation path in versions < SP18.

/SAPTRX/ASSIGN_APPOBJ.summary: SAP Track and Trace namespace function: insufficient authorisation check allows cross-tenant data access.

/SCMB/MON_JCDS_INBOUND.summary: SAP SCM namespace: inbound monitoring function exposes order data without tenant isolation.

/BEV1/RBBRWAUFT.summary: SAP Beverage industry namespace: audit trail function allows backdated entries under certain configs.

/IWFND/SG_MED_CATALOG.summary: SAP Gateway namespace: catalog service exposes internal OData metadata to unauthenticated callers.

/SAPAPO/MVM_LIST.summary: SAP APO namespace: material version management list function allows cross-client material read.

/ISDFPS/ADOPT_FPS_OBJECT.summary: SAP Defense Forces namespace: object adoption function misses authorisation check on target client.

/SAPPSSRM/DB_WRITE.summary: SAP SRM namespace: direct database write function bypasses SRM transaction validation layer.

/BOBF/CONF_UI_MODEL_GET.summary: SAP BOPF namespace: configuration model read function leaks internal UI model structure to low-priv users.

/SRMERP/PURCH_REQ_CREATE.summary: SAP SRM ERP namespace: purchase requisition creation function lacks secondary authorisation on cost centres.

INCLUDE_ZCOMMON_DB_UTILS.summary: Custom INCLUDE program: known SQL concatenation vulnerability in shared ABAP utility library.

INCLUDE_ZAUTH_BYPASS.summary: Custom INCLUDE program: auth bypass pattern detected — AUTHORITY-CHECK ... DUMMY used unconditionally.

SUSR_USER_AUTH_FOR_OBJ_GET.summary: User authorisation enumeration via SUSR_USER_AUTH_FOR_OBJ_GET can expose authorisation object assignments.
